answer_attempt:
The course is a 15-month, applied, project-centric, and industry-aligned program in AI, offered at the Masters' Union campus in Gurugram, India. It is designed for graduates and working professionals with up to 5 years of experience. 

Key features of the course include:
* Hands-on pedagogy
* Offline and online learning modes
* Focus on real-world problem-solving using AI technologies
* Building 6 AI systems in 6 terms
* Studio and laboratory access
* Mentorship sessions
* Collaborative team pro

chat_history.msg: What skills will I gain after completing the program?

After completing the program, you will gain skills in:
* Hands-on AI system design and development
* Real-world problem-solving using AI technologies
* Data acquisition and processing
* Model training and evaluation
* Deployment and monitoring
* Automation and workflow integration
* Leadership and decision-making abilities
* Critical soft skills for the AI industry 

These skills will be developed through the program's hands-on pedagogy, mentorship sessions, collaborative team projects, and building 6 AI systems in 6 terms.
